---
title: "Character Sheet"
params:
  character: "character.yml"
format:
  html:
    theme: none
    css: styles/sheet.css
    toc: false
    page-layout: custom
    self-contained: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{r setup}
library(yaml)
ch <- yaml.load_file("character.yml")

# Helper: ability modifier
mod <- function(score) floor((score - 10) / 2)
mod_str <- function(score) {
  m <- mod(score)
  if (m >= 0) paste0("+", m) else as.character(m)
}

# Proficiency bonus by level
prof_bonus <- function(level) ceiling(level / 4) + 1
pb <- prof_bonus(ch$level)
```

```{r sheet-html, results='asis'}
# Render the full sheet as raw HTML via R
source("R/render_sheet.R")
render_sheet(ch, pb, mod, mod_str)
```
